# Build Execution Summary

- Status: completed
- Actions: Implemented only the bounded review fixes from the governed contract. Added a real `db:seed` path at the root and in `packages/db` with `packages/db/src/seed.ts`, added a separate worker deployment pipeline via `.github/workflows/worker-deploy.yml` plus `apps/worker/fly.toml` and `apps/worker/Dockerfile` and a worker `start` script, and replaced `apps/web/src/app/page.tsx` with a blank shell page. Added a repo-level contract test in `tests/phase1-foundation-contract.test.mjs` and wired it into the root `test` script. No contract inconsistency was found in the predecessor artifacts.
- Files touched: `package.json`, `tests/phase1-foundation-contract.test.mjs`, `packages/db/package.json`, `packages/db/src/seed.ts`, `apps/worker/package.json`, `apps/worker/Dockerfile`, `apps/worker/fly.toml`, `.github/workflows/worker-deploy.yml`, `apps/web/src/app/page.tsx`
- Verification: `node --test tests/phase1-foundation-contract.test.mjs` passed; `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run test`, and `npm run build` passed; `docker compose up -d postgres redis` succeeded; `npm run db:migrate` succeeded; `npm run db:seed` succeeded when rerun outside the sandbox after a sandbox localhost `EPERM`; `npm run dev` started web and worker, and an escalated `curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3001` confirmed the served homepage is an empty `<main class="min-h-screen" aria-label="Application shell"></main>`. `next build` emitted a non-blocking Next.js ESLint plugin detection warning.
